{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Sweet Maker
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Sweet Maker]] is an entity [[Simon]] invokes in distress.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6">''House of Blades'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“What? Sweet Maker, what is happening to me?”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
